title: Office Supplies Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for total cost of office supplies, incorporating lean inventory principles, waste reduction, and data confidence adjustments.

inputs.label: Annual Usage (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of office supply units (e.g., reams of paper, pens) consumed per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of office supply units (e.g., reams of paper, pens) consumed per year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yılda tüketilen toplam ofis malzemesi birimi sayısı (ör. top kağıt, kalem).

inputs.label: Unit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Average purchase cost per unit of the office supply item.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average purchase cost per unit of the office supply item.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ofis malzemesi birimi başına ortalama satın alma maliyeti.

inputs.label: Order Cost per Purchase Order
inputs.businessContext: Fixed cost associated with placing a single purchase order (labor, processing, etc.).

label_i18n.tr: Satın Alma Siparişi Başına Sipariş Maliyeti

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed cost associated with placing a single purchase order (labor, processing, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir satın alma siparişi vermekle ilgili sabit maliyet (işçilik, işlem vb.).

inputs.label: Holding Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual inventory holding cost as a percentage of unit cost (storage, insurance, obsolescence).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual inventory holding cost as a percentage of unit cost (storage, insurance, obsolescence).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim maliyetin yüzdesi olarak yıllık stok bulundurma maliyeti (depolama, sigorta, eskime).

inputs.label: Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of supplies wasted due to over-ordering, expiration, or damage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of supplies wasted due to over-ordering, expiration, or damage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aşırı sipariş, son kullanma veya hasar nedeniyle israf edilen malzeme yüzdesi tahmini.

inputs.label: Order Frequency
inputs.businessContext: How often orders are placed, affecting order size and inventory levels.

businessContext_i18n.en: How often orders are placed, affecting order size and inventory levels.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Siparişlerin ne sıklıkta verildiği, sipariş büyüklüğünü ve stok seviyelerini etkiler.

inputs.label: Use Lean Inventory Principles
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, applies just-in-time ordering to reduce holding costs and waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: If enabled, applies just-in-time ordering to reduce holding costs and waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etkinleştirilirse, stok taşıma maliyetlerini ve israfı azaltmak için tam zamanında sipariş uygulanır.

rules.message: Waste percentage must be less than 100%.
Lean inventory requires weekly or biweekly ordering frequency.

thresholds.message: Waste percentage exceeds 15% – consider root cause analysis.
Annual holding cost exceeds $5,000 – review inventory turnover.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
